title: Python Developer Jobs
tagline: Python roles with Python, Django, Flask, FastAPI, or PySpark in the title: backend, data, and platform positions in the US and worldwide. Listings come straight from company career pages.
description: Python developer jobs updated daily. Backend, data, and platform roles (Django, Flask, FastAPI, PySpark) with salaries, from 400,000+ crawled listings.
keywords: Python developer roles (Django, Flask, FastAPI, PySpark) across backend, data, and platform teams

siblings.label: Data Engineering Jobs: pipelines, warehouses, and data platform roles
Remote Tech Jobs: fully remote engineering roles
New Grad Software Engineer Jobs: entry-level roles for graduates

faq.q: How often is this list updated?
faq.a: Once a day. A GitHub Action pulls new Python listings from Dreamwork's public API, which crawls company career pages directly (Greenhouse, Lever, Ashby, Workday, and others). Use <kbd>Ctrl</kbd>+<kbd>F</kbd> for Django, Flask, FastAPI, or PySpark roles.

faq.q: What counts as a Python job here?
faq.a: Roles that name Python (or a core Python framework like Django, Flask, FastAPI, or PySpark) in the job title. Plenty of other postings use Python somewhere in the stack; keeping the filter on titles keeps every row unambiguously a Python role.

faq.q: Where does the salary data come from?
faq.a: From the postings themselves. When a posting does not state pay, the column is blank. Nothing is estimated.

faq.q: Can a tool apply to these for me?
faq.a: Yes. Dreamwork matches your resume against every listing here, tailors each application, and can submit them for you. Seeing your matches is free.
